content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

February 2, 1990

Shirley L. Grindle
Treasurer for Miguel Pulido
19051 Glen Arran
Orange, CA 92669

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-90-022

Dear Ms. Grindle:

You have requested advice on behalf of Councilman Miguel
Pulido under the campaign disclosure provisions of the Political
Reform Act.1/

FACTS

The Los Angeles City Club donated the use of one of its rooms
for a fundraising event for Santa Ana Councilman Miguel Pulido.

QUESTION

How is the value of a donated room used for a fundraising
event determined for purposes of reporting an in-kind
contribution?

ANSWER

The candidate must report the fair market value of the
donated room. The fair market value is whatever it would cost the
candidate to rent the room directly from the Los Angeles City Club
or a similar room on the open market.

_________________________
1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory
references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated.
Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations
Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title
2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.

428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916) 322-5660

Shirley L. Grindle
Page 2


ANALYSIS

Section 82025.5 requires that whenever the amount of goods or
services, facilities or anything of value other than money is
required to be reported, "the amount reported shall be the fair
market value." Therefore, a good faith effort must be made to
determine the fair market value of what it would cost Councilman
Pulido to rent similar space on the open market. Additionally, if
the Los Angeles City Club rents rooms to the public, Section 84300
requires that if a candidate requests a determination of an in-kind contribution with a fair market value of $100 or more in writing, the contributor, in turn, must provide the candidate in writing the fair market value of the donated goods or service.

Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5662 if you
have additional questions.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan
General Counsel
[signature]

By: Lynda Cassady
Political Reform Consultant
